free_text: Excitation of isobaric analogue states in (p,n)
reactions at 30 and 50 MeV and the isospin dependence
of the optical model.
.Microscopic model.Macroscopic model.
.The neutron detectors were 5 cm long by 11 cm
diam. Cylinders of NE102 plastic scintillator viewed
by XP1040 photomultipliers.
.The Rutherford Laboratory proton linear
accelerator.
.For analog state region.
The errors on the cross section values were estimated
by taking into account the errors on the individual
points and the uncertainty in the background
subtraction.
.An absolute error in the cross section is 10%
including the uncertainty in the measured efficiency
The errors on the cross-section values were
estimated by taking into account the errors on the
individual points and the uncertainty in the
background subtraction.
Corrections were applied for:
* the neutron detection efficiency,
* the attenuation due to the air along the 10 m flight
path and due to an aluminium plate used to prevent
scattered protons being recorded in the detectors;
* background.
Tbl.2 from NP/A,116,643.
